case_title: SERIES AGI NORTH HOLLYWOOD OF APPIAN GROUP VS. MARK HANDEL

docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT BY STIPULATION
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERIES AGI NORTH HOLLYWOOD OF APPIAN GROUP INVESTORS DE, LLC, A DELAWARE SERIES LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT HANDEL, MARK

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SERIES AGI NORTH HOLLYWOOD OF APPIAN GROUP INVESTORS DE, LLC, A DELAWARE SERIES LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HANDEL, MARK $20,000,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,000,000.00, (PLUS INTEREST AT 6% PER ANNUM) SEE SCANNED DOC
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-10-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERIES AGI NORTH HOLLYWOOD OF APPIAN GROUP INVESTORS DE, LLC, A DELAWARE SERIES LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT HANDEL, MARK SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-10-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-10-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-25-2012
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIP FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERIES AGI NORTH HOLLYWOOD OF APPIAN GROUP INVESTORS DE, LLC, A DELAWARE SERIES LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
